afterSnapshot.name: getWeatherGrid

200.description: Grid of cloud cover and pressure data points

grid.description: Array of {lat, lon, cloudCover, pressure, hourly} objects

schema.summary: Get weather grid data for area overlays

afterSnapshot.purpose: Serve cloud cover and pressure grid data for area overlays on the map.
afterSnapshot.duplicateJustification: getDirections analyzes sailing conditions in 8 compass directions using fetchWeather with scoring logic. getWeatherGrid fetches a 5x5 spatial grid of cloud_cover and pressure_msl data using fetchWeatherGrid — completely different data source, API call, and purpose (area overlays vs directional sailing scores). They share only the withValidatedCoords pattern.

duplicateCandidates.name: getDirections
duplicateCandidates.purpose: Analyze sailing conditions in 8 compass directions, mapping Result to HTTP response.

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: New endpoint needed for the cloud cover and pressure area overlay features — provides a grid of weather data points around the boat's position.
implementation: Delegates coordinate validation to the existing withValidatedCoords helper, then calls fetchWeatherGrid and maps the Result to HTTP response — consistent with the existing getWeather handler pattern.
